slides.title: The fruit juice that *helps you sleep*.
slides.sub: Tart cherry is one of the few natural sources of melatonin — the hormone your brain uses to wind down. Most people reach for pills first.

slides.title: It carries real melatonin
slides.body: Tart cherries are a natural source of *melatonin* — the hormone that signals your brain it's time to wind down.

slides.title: It supports your own supply
slides.body: Tart cherry is also rich in compounds that may help your body *hold onto melatonin* longer through the night.

slides.title: A glass before bed
slides.body: A *small glass* about an hour before bed is the common approach — look for unsweetened, 100% tart cherry.

slides.title: Gentle, not knock-out
slides.body: Unlike a sleeping pill, it nudges your *natural rhythm* instead of forcing you under — so you wake clearer, not groggy.

slides.title: Fall asleep faster, naturally
slides.body: Pair it with a dark, cool room and you give your body *two melatonin signals* working together.

slides.title: Fall asleep faster, *the natural way*.
slides.body: Log your nightly routine and Vibe Health connects what you drink and do before bed to how you actually sleep — so you see what's working.

caption:
Tart cherry juice is one of the few natural sources of melatonin. 🍒😴

A small glass before bed, in a dark cool room, may help you fall asleep faster — no pills, no grogginess. Save it. 🔖

Vibe Health connects your night routine to how you actually sleep → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Fruit Juice That Helps You Sleep Naturally
